field_values.action_summary: Alice wakes up on the riverbank, back to her normal size. She tells her sister about the dream. As they sit together at sunset, the sister reflects on how the sounds of the real world echo the strange sounds of Wonderland.
field_values.emotional_beat: From the disorientation of waking to a peaceful, reflective calm.
field_values.camera_intent: Wide shots of the riverbank at sunset; Close-ups of Alice and her sister's faces; Static tranquil environmental shots
field_values.end_state: scene resolves into the next narrative beat
movement_notes: Lighting transition from bright daylight to golden hour/sunset
Scale contrast between dream proportions and normal human size
field_values.transition_notes:
# Scene Contract: CH012_SC04

## Production Intent
Ground the story in a naturalistic reality to provide a thematic epilogue following the surrealism of the dream world.

## Required Cast
- Alice (Normal)
- Alice's Sister

## Required Environments
- The Riverbank (Real World/Natural Setting)

## Continuity Constraints
- Lighting transition from bright daylight to golden hour/sunset.
- Contrast in scale between the dream world and this grounded reality.

## Beat List
- BT001: Alice wakes up on the riverbank at her normal size.
- BT002: Alice tells her sister about the dream.
- BT003: The sister reflects on how the sounds of the real world echo Wonderland.
field_values.dialogue_relevance: dialogue supports scene intent and continuity
